description_long: This is a medium-sized loaf of rustic bread with a golden-brown, slightly matte crust. The surface features five deep, diagonal score marks running across the top, giving it a classic artisan appearance. The crust appears crisp and uneven, with some areas showing a lighter, flour-dusted finish. The loaf is oval-shaped, with rounded ends and a slightly domed top. The sides and bottom are less textured, with a more uniform, baked coloration. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A golden-brown, oval loaf of rustic bread with deep diagonal scoring and a crisp, matte crust.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the loaf and the prominent diagonal scoring on the top crust.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the rounded tip and the depth of the scoring lines across the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the loaf's length and the scored crust.
description_view_3: Other end view, showing the rounded end and the continuation of the scoring pattern.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust features five deep, diagonal score marks across the top, creating a classic artisan bread look. The surface is uneven and rustic, with some areas lightly dusted with flour and a matte, golden-brown finish.
